title: Transformers Collaborative Sonic the Hedgehog x Wingtail and Blue Booster Action Figures
features: TRANSFORMERS X SONIC THE HEDGEHOG COLLABORATIVE 2-FIGURE PACK: includes Blue Booster and Wingtail converting action figures, inspired by Sonic the Hedgehog characters
BLUE BOOSTER FIGURE: the 12.7-cm (5 inch) Blue Booster figure converts from robot to car mode in 27 steps. Inspired by the Sonic character and the Speed Star car
WINGTAIL FIGURE: the 12.7-cm (5 inch) Wingtail figure converts from robot to biplane mode in 32 steps. Inspired by the Tails character and the Tornado biplane
AMAZING ACCESSORIES: includes ring shield and jewel accessories as well as a detachable engine thruster that becomes a blaster accessory
SONIC THE HEDGEHOG-INSPIRED PACKAGING: premium packaging captures the look of the Sonic the Hedgehog world. It’s a great present for anyone who loves Transformers toys and Sonic the Hedgehog toys!
description: Product Description The worlds of Transformers robots and Sonic the Hedgehog collide with the Sonic the Hedgehog x Transformers mash-up pack! The 12.7-cm (5 inch) converting action figures convert from robot mode to alt mode and feature accurate deco and details. The Blue Booster figure converts between robot and car mode in 27 steps. The Wingtail figure converts between robot and biplane mode in 32 steps. Comes with accessories including ring shield and jewel accessories for the Blue Booster figure, and a detachable engine thruster that becomes a blaster for the Wingtail figure. Transformers robots have always been – More Than Meets the Eye – and now, through the Transformers Collaborative, fans can experience more exciting characters as they team-up, mash-up and meet up with other characters, teams and people who share this same special quality. TRANSFORMERS and HASBRO and all related trademarks and logos are trademarks of Hasbro, Inc. Copyright SEGA. All rights reserved. Safety Warning Ages 8 and up WARNING: Small parts and a small ball. Not for children under 3 years.
